Meeting Notes - Q4 Planning

Date: 2024-01-15
Attendees: Alice, Bob, Charlie

Agenda

  2. Set Q4 targets

Discussion Points

Revenue target was exceeded by 15%. The team performed well in all regions.

Action Items
